2002.reason: [When encountering a single '&', it should create a token with literal "&" not "&&", and this incorrect token creation will cause parsing issues]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not create an AND token with "&&" literal. It should either create a token with "&" literal or handle it differently, but creating "&&" token for single '&' is incorrect and will cause parsing errors downstream.]

2013.reason: [When encountering a single '|', it should create a token with literal "|" not "&&", this is clearly a copy-paste error that creates wrong token literal]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '|', it should create a token with literal "|" not "&&", this is clearly a copy-paste error that creates wrong token literal]
